items.question: How do I know this works for me?
items.answer: NELLO ONE uses internationally validated methodologies (DISC, MBTI, Enneagram, etc.) combined with AI to create personalized insights. If you want clarity about who you are and how to improve, it works for you.

items.question: Do I need to understand psychology?
items.answer: No. NELLO ONE translates complex concepts into simple, practical language. Miguel, our AI, explains everything clearly and accessibly.

items.question: Is it really different from other tests?
items.answer: Yes. Other tests give you isolated results. NELLO ONE integrates 7 assessments into a single map, showing how your patterns connect and how you can evolve.

items.question: What results can I expect?
items.answer: Clarity about your emotional patterns, strengths, blind spots, communication style and growth direction. All in a visual and practical map.

items.question: Does it work if I'm emotionally lost?
items.answer: Especially. NELLO ONE was made for moments of confusion. It organizes what you feel into clarity and direction.

items.question: Why are prices different in Real and Dollar?
items.answer: NELLO ONE serves people worldwide. To offer fair prices for each region, we use two policies: Local Pricing in Brazil and Global Pricing for international users. This ensures everyone can access the same quality with balanced conditions.

items.question: Can I buy in another country's currency?
items.answer: No. NELLO ONE automatically blocks purchases in incorrect currencies to prevent errors, fraud and unfair price differences. You always pay in the currency matching your browsing region.

pricing.question: Why are the prices different in Real and in Dollar?
pricing.answer: NELLO ONE serves people from all over the world. To offer fair prices for each region, we use two policies: Local Pricing — in Brazil, we apply values suited to the local economic reality. Global Pricing — for international users, we use the currency and pricing standards of the global market. This way, everyone can access the same level of quality, with balanced and transparent conditions.

currency.question: Can I buy in another country's currency?
currency.answer: No. NELLO ONE automatically blocks attempts to purchase in an incorrect currency to prevent errors, fraud, and unfair price differences. You will always pay in the currency corresponding to the language and region you are browsing: Brazil → Real (R$), Global → Dollar (US$). This ensures equality, security and a better experience.

what_is.title: What is NELLO ONE?
what_is.description: NELLO ONE is an intelligent self-discovery platform that combines scientifically grounded personality tests, emotional design and AI-guided insights to reveal who you are and how you function — with clarity and simplicity.

miguel.title: Meet Miguel
miguel.subtitle: Your Inner Guide
miguel.description: Miguel analyzes your test results, identifies your core patterns, explains your emotional and behavioral tendencies, and helps you build clarity about who you are. With calm guidance, he walks with you through your entire self-discovery process.

tests.description: Accurate, professional tests translated into a simple and intuitive visual experience.
